channel.title: Emacs on Pragmatic
channel.description: Recent content in Emacs on Pragmatic

item.title: Creating new Org Files for Hugo
item.description: As the command `hugo new` does not work for org files I'm using emacs for that task. The code is based on what I found at Peter Smith's which seem to be based on the code from Tohojo. First we've to set the location where the blog source files are. (setq hugo-base-dir "~/Documents/repo/TechBlog/") Then we need the current time in two formats. The first for the name of the file we are creating and the second is used in the frontmatter.
